data.title: BNB Surpasses 970 USDT with a 3.64% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 27, 2025, 12:30 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 970 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 970.090027 USDT, with a narrowed 3.64% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: LIGHT rose to 1 USDT, a short-term increase of 35%.
data.description: Market data shows that LIGHT has risen to 1 USDT, a short-term increase of 35%, and is currently quoted at 1.01 USDT.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Assistant Director of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority: The Hong Kong government's third batch of tokenized bonds may be included in CBDC subscriptions; 2. Peter Schiff: Bitcoin's year-to-date gains have lagged behind precious metals such as gold and silver, and it may have been in a long-term hidden bear market; 3. El Salvador has increased its holdings by 8 BTC in the past 7 days, bringing its total holdings to 6,332.18; 4. Bitdeer mined 108.3 BTC this week, increasing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,997.5; 5. ether.fi repurchased a total of 127,000 ETHFI this week, bringing the total agreed repurchase amount to over US$7.1 million to date; 6. Richard Byworth, partner of Syz Capital, withdrew his investment from the Bitcoin ETF and MSTR to Metaplanet; 7. US Secretary of Commerce: Trump may forgive Musk but will not forget the negative impact.

data.title: BitMart Launches GOAT Network (GOATED)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will launch GOAT Network (GOATED) at 8:00 PM (ET) on September 27th, opening the GOATED/USDT trading pair. The GOAT Network is a Bitcoin-native ZK Rollup designed to provide sustainable native BTC returns through a groundbreaking combination of in-house zkMIPS (the fastest production-grade zkVM), a practical BitVM 2 challenge model (reducing the challenge period from 14 days to less than 1 day), and Bitcoin's first decentralized sequencer network.

data.description:

data.title: Polymarket Predicts 71% Chance of U.S. Government Shutdown in October
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the probability of a U.S. government shutdown on October 1st is currently reported at 71% on Polymarket's official website. This prediction reflects growing concerns over potential disruptions in government operations.

data.title: Federal Reserve Officials to Address Key Economic Concerns Next Week
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve officials are set to make several public appearances next week, with potential implications for economic indicators and the upcoming Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting. If the U.S. government shuts down on October 1, the release of the employment report may be delayed, potentially affecting the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and the October FOMC meeting.

On Monday at 20:00 (UTC+8), Loretta Mester, the Cleveland Fed President and 2026 FOMC voting member, will participate in a policy panel discussion.

On Tuesday at 01:30 (UTC+8), John Williams, the New York Fed President and permanent FOMC voting member, along with James Bullard, the St. Louis Fed President and 2025 FOMC voting member, will deliver speeches.

At 06:00 (UTC+8) on Tuesday, Raphael Bostic, the Atlanta Fed President and 2027 FOMC voting member, will engage in a dialogue with the CEO of Delta Air Lines on topics related to the Atlanta economy.

Later on Tuesday at 18:00 (UTC+8), Federal Reserve Vice Chair Philip Jefferson will speak.

On Wednesday at 01:00 (UTC+8), Austan Goolsbee, the Chicago Fed President and 2025 FOMC voting member, will deliver remarks.

At 07:10 (UTC+8) on Wednesday, Lorie Logan, the Dallas Fed President and 2026 FOMC voting member, will speak, followed by another speech from Vice Chair Jefferson at 08:30 (UTC+8).

On Thursday at 22:30 (UTC+8), Lorie Logan will again address the public.

Finally, on Friday at 18:05 (UTC+8), John Williams will speak at a farewell symposium for Klaas Knot, the outgoing President of the Dutch Central Bank.

Additionally, on Friday at 20:30 (UTC+8), the U.S. will release data on September's non-farm payrolls, unemployment rate, and average hourly earnings.

data.title: USDH issuer Native Markets: 200,000 HYPE tokens have been pledged and locked for 3 years
data.description: According to official news, USDH issuer Native Markets has pledged and locked up 200,000 HYPE (approximately $8.7 million) for three years. Previously, Native Markets won the Hyperliquid stablecoin USDH auction, and Hyperliquid has launched the HYPE/USDH spot trading pair.

data.title: Market Tensions Rise Amid Central Bank Communications and Seasonal Factors
data.description:
According to PANews, market sentiment has been tense this week due to communications from central banks and seasonal factors, with cryptocurrencies experiencing the most significant impact. Despite maintaining relatively high levels, their price movements resemble a minor correction rather than a simple pullback. Ethereum has fallen below $4,000, and Bitcoin is just shy of $110,000. The market is closely watching to see if further corrections in cryptocurrencies will trigger additional reactions from the persistent market frenzy.

Key events to watch this week include:

On Monday at 20:00 (UTC+8), 2026 FOMC voting member and Cleveland Fed President Harker will participate in a policy panel discussion.

On Tuesday at 01:30 (UTC+8), FOMC permanent voting member and New York Fed President Williams, along with 2025 FOMC voting member and St. Louis Fed President Mussa, will deliver speeches.

At 06:00 (UTC+8) on Tuesday, 2027 FOMC voting member and Atlanta Fed President Bostic will discuss economic topics with Delta Air Lines CEO.

At 18:00 (UTC+8) on Tuesday, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson will speak.

At 21:45 (UTC+8) on Tuesday, the U.S. September Chicago PMI will be released.

At 22:00 (UTC+8) on Tuesday, the U.S. August JOLTs job openings and September Conference Board Consumer Confidence Index will be announced.

On Wednesday at 01:00 (UTC+8), 2025 FOMC voting member and Chicago Fed President Goolsbee will speak.

At 07:10 (UTC+8) on Wednesday, 2026 FOMC voting member and Dallas Fed President Logan will deliver remarks.

At 08:30 (UTC+8) on Wednesday, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson will speak again.

On Thursday at 20:30 (UTC+8), the U.S. initial jobless claims for the week ending September 27 and the August factory orders month-over-month rate will be released.

At 22:30 (UTC+8) on Thursday, 2026 FOMC voting member and Dallas Fed President Logan will speak again.

On Friday at 18:05 (UTC+8), FOMC permanent voting member and New York Fed President Williams will speak at the farewell symposium for Dutch Central Bank President Knot.

At 20:30 (UTC+8) on Friday, the U.S. September non-farm payrolls, unemployment rate, and average hourly earnings year-over-year and month-over-month rates will be released.

data.title: "Big Brother Maji" increased his XPL five-fold leverage long position to 8.8 million, worth $13.3 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, "Big Brother Maji" Huang Licheng increased his XPL holdings fivefold to 8.8 million coins, worth $13.3 million, with an average opening price of $1.55. The current floating loss on a single coin is $381,000, and the overall floating loss on the position is $14.06 million.

data.description:

data.title: SunPerp's public beta has surpassed 7,000 users in 10 days, with a cumulative transaction volume of 19.5 million USDT.
data.description: According to official social media, SunPerp, a decentralized perpetual contract exchange within the TRON ecosystem, has surpassed 7,000 users and achieved an average daily trading volume of 1.95 million USDT on its 10th day of public beta. Compared to the first week of public beta, total trading volume increased by 6,200%, with daily trading volume increasing by 153.4%. SunPerp will reportedly use SUN as its platform token and plans to use platform revenue for SUN buybacks and burns. Since the public beta launch, on-chain SUN transfers have increased significantly.

data.title: Hyperliquid launches HYPE/USDH spot trading pair
data.description: According to the official website, Hyperliquid has just launched the HYPE/USDH spot trading pair, having previously launched USDH/USDC.

data.title: Bitcoin Tipped To Peak In 2026 – Here’s Why
data.description:
Following a rather turbulent trading week, Bitcoin prices now sit below $110,000, representing a 12% decline from its all-time high at $124,457. Amid this situation, popular analyst Ted Pillows has shared an audacious market prediction that would douse fears of an impending cycle top. Related Reading: Bitcoin Bull Run Is Over? These Signals Show Where The Market Is At Institutional Demand To Extend Bitcoin Market Cycle To 2026 A typical crypto market cycle has always peaked in Q4 of the fourth year. This timing usually matches the post-halving hype and a strong wave of retail and institutional market demand
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-tipped-to-peak-in-2026-heres-why/
